data.description:
## Incident Overview
CI 'Ticket tests (alpine-busybox)' fails with 'ticket_create returned id: expected non-empty, actual empty'.

Pre-existing on main: platform-matrix CI run 25029046093 on commit 9e0b85f64b (after fix commit) still shows alpine-busybox failure.

Root cause: ticket-lib-api.sh functions (ticket_create, ticket_comment, etc.) call `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` without GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1. In Alpine Docker containers, git stops at the Docker volume mount boundary, returning empty REPO_ROOT, causing TRACKER_DIR to be invalid and all ticket operations to fail.

The fix commit 65d6c900dc added GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1 only to the test scripts (test-ticket-platform-compat.sh, test-ticket-lib-api.sh) but NOT to the internal git calls in ticket-lib-api.sh itself.
data.title: Ticket tests (alpine-busybox): ticket_create returns empty in Docker due to GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM not set in ticket-lib-api.sh functions
